mapper.select: select id, medication_id, user_id, log_date, doses_taken, created_at from medication_daily_logs where user_id = #{userId} and medication_id = #{medicationId} and log_date = #{logDate} limit 1
mapper.insert: insert into medication_daily_logs ( medication_id, user_id, log_date, doses_taken, created_at ) values ( #{medicationId}, #{userId}, #{logDate}, #{dosesTaken}, #{createdAt} )
